message:
chore: ignore agent-specific target directories in .gitignore

Adds target_*/ pattern to catch per-agent build directories like
target_bluemill/, target_lilaccave/, target_rubybay/ that concurrent
agents create as isolated compilation targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 # Rust / Cargo build artifacts
 /target/
 **/target/
+target_*/
 
 # Cargo lock is committed (workspace contains binary crate fsqlite-cli)
 # Cargo.lock
